title: -ENGLISH COURSES EXEMPTION EXAM REUSLTS(UNDERGRADUTE DEPARTMENTS).xls
content:
-ENGLISH COURSES EXEMPTION EXAM REUSLTS(UNDERGRADUTE DEPARTMENTS).xls

click the link below;

IN ORDER TO FIND YOUR STUDENT NUMBER IN THE LIST,

YOU SHOULD USE YOUR COMPUTER, PRESS THE

KEYS ON YOUR KEYBOARD AT THE SAME TIME, WRITE YOUR STUDENT NUMBER IN THE BOX THAT APPEARS AND THEN CLICK THE BUTTON "FIND".

THE STUDENTS, WHO DIDN’T ATTEND THE EXEMPTION EXAM OR COULD NOT SUCCEED IN THE EXAM, WILL CONTINUE TO TAKE THE RELATED COMPULSORY ENGLISH COURSES DURING THE SEMESTRES. THE EXAM WILL NOT BE REPEATED FOR THOSE STUDENTS WHO DIDN’T TAKE THE EXAM.
